author: fix-pendingresponse
content: CONVERGED (VDD R2): All 3 R1 critical findings fixed — inject()/extract() across both process boundaries, per-record spans instead of per-connection, test hard-asserts all three services with shared trace IDs. Remaining: dead backward-compat else branch (cleanup, not functional), duplicate span names, __otel_ctx naming convention, sleep(5) race in test. Verdict: Begrudgingly Adequate. Ready for PR.
